heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 981, 982 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 981, , pt. II, § 246, , related to civil status of reservists. See , Government Organization and Employees.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 495section 502 of Title 5

Section 982, , pt. II, § 247, , authorized members of reserve components to accept employment with and compensation from any foreign government or any concern which is controlled in whole or in part by a foreign government. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 495section 1032 of Title 10
